subsidyType: block-by-block city replacement project with customer-side costs expected to be covered by water rate increases
publicSideCovered: yes the city is planning and funding public-side work through the water capital program
privateSideCovered: yes the city anticipates the customer-side replacement cost will be covered by rate increases though final costs are not guaranteed
propertyRules: properties with lead lines are prioritized through block-by-block construction areas and final customer responsibility depends on available project funds
contractorRules: city-managed construction program coordinates replacements and restoration
